RelativeDateKeyword.description: Relative date keyword. Now includes time for date-time fields.

IsoDateTimeString.description: ISO date-time with optional fractional seconds and timezone.

DateConstraint.description: ISO date, ISO date-time, or relative keyword.

XPermissions.description: Role-based visibility and read-only overrides when permissionKey is set.

XEventFieldMapping.description: Maps event types to payload field names.

description.description: Help text below the field. Default: unset.

readOnly.description: Read-only in edit mode. Default: false. Overridable via x-permissions or views.

default.description: Initial value when unset. Type matches field type.

const.description: Fixed value; field is immutable. Default: unset.

pattern.description: Regex pattern for string validation. Default: unset.

format.description: String format (date, email, uuid, etc.). Default: unset.

multipleOf.description: Value must be a multiple of this number. Default: unset.

oneOf.description: Allowed values (radio/select) or oneOf alternatives. Default: unset.

properties.description: Nested field definitions for object type. Default: unset.

items.description: Schema for array items. Default: unset.

required.description: Required nested property names. Default: unset.

additionalProperties.description: Allow extra properties on object. Default: unset.

x-permissions.description: Role-based visibility and read-only overrides. Default: unset.

x-type.description: Custom semantic type (e.g. category). Default: unset.

x-jsf-presentation.description: UI presentation and layout options. Default: unset.

x-event-field-mapping.description: Maps event types to payload field names. Default: unset.

TextVariant.description: Text mode: plain or HTML. Default: default.

DurationVariation.description: Duration unit: days or hours. Default: none.

NumberFormat.description: Number format: default (2dp), integer, decimal (6dp), decimal-1. Default: unset (up to 4dp).

supplierVisible.description: Visible to suppliers. Default: true. Deprecated: use x-permissions.

tableColumnFlex.description: Table column flex weight. Default: unset.

gridBreak.description: Start new grid row. Default: false.

views.description: Overrides for named view. Default: unset.

i18n.description: Locale overrides for title, description, suffixTooltip, addFieldText. Default: unset.

resetFieldsOnChange.description: Fields to reset on value change. Default: unset.

punchOutFilterKey.description: Punch-out catalog filter field key. Default: unset.

stored.description: Include in stored-form payload. Default: false.

externalKey.description: External prefilled value key. Default: unset.

priceBooksFilterKey.description: Price book catalog filter key (datafield only). Default: unset.

priceBooksItemFilterKey.description: Price book item filter key. Default: unset.

canCopy.description: Show copy action in view mode. Default: false.

description.description: HTML description override. Default: unset (uses schema description).

currencyKey.description: Field supplying currency code. Default: unset.

fieldsetFilter.description: Filters for datafield/preferred-supplier fieldsets. Default: unset.

datafieldPreview.description: Paths shown in datafield preview. Default: unset.

mapPreferredSupplierToItems.description: Map supplier id to intake line items. Default: false.

geolocationSearchDisabled.description: Disable geolocation; use saved buyer addresses only. Default: false.

defaultItems.description: Initial number of items for group-array fields. Default: unset.

PresentationViews.description: Per-view presentation overrides. Omitted keys inherit base values.

Presentation.description: Field widget and layout. inputType required.
